title: Moar Axes
description: The Moar Axes datapack adds a bunch of new axe types to the game. These are designed to be unique with special attributes and abilities while attempting to also feel like they could get close to fitting into the vanilla game.
body:
Moar Axes

The Moar Axes datapack adds a bunch of new axe types to the game. These are designed to be unique with special attributes and abilities while attempting to also feel like they could get close to fitting into the vanilla game.

You can craft them in the Vanilla Crafting Table. All recipes can all be found HERE, or in-game in the Recipe Guide

The datapack REQUIRES this Library, as well as this Resource Pack.

Learn more from this video:

Free Axes

  • Fire Axe:
    • The Fire Axe sets blocks that you break on fire. It sets mobs hit ablaze. Players that are hit have fire placed where they are.

  • Giant’s Axe:
    • A massive axe that breaks a 3x3x3 area of logs. Can be used to clear out giant amounts of logs at a time.

  • Replanting Axe:
    • Automatically places saplings of the log type broken if a plantable surface is below the log broken.

  • Water Axe:
    • A slow axe out of water, but can instant-mine (Efficiency 20) block when you are fully submerged underwater.

  • Enchanted Book Axe:
    • Has a 1/100 chance to drop a randomly enchanted book. It gets enchanted between the levels of 15-30. Can get treasure enchantments such as Mending.

  • Blaze Rod Axe:
    • Autosmelts log blocks, turning them into charcoal.

  • Berserker Axe:
    • Deals massive damage, but also hurts you with recoil. Might be overpowered.

  • Magnetic Axe:
    • Pulls blocks broken to you, making them easy and quick to pick up.

Patron Exclusive Axes ($1+)

  • Ender Axe:
    • Strip a log to set a teleport location. All mined blocks will teleport to that location.

  • Instant Axe:
    • Simply an expensive recipe for Instant Mine.

  • Throwing Axe:
    • Right-click to throw. It breaks wooden blocks it hits and can damage mobs.

  • Inverted Axe:
    • Right-click to unstrip logs.
